result.name: Diadem of death
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 4 Form: Crown made of feathers, bits of bone, burnt hair, and old teeth Effect: When worn on someone’s head, looped over a limb, or otherwise placed upon their person, the crown inflicts damage equal to its level.

sections.name: Diadem of death
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 4

Form: Crown made of feathers, bits of bone, burnt hair, and old teeth

Effect: When worn on someone’s head, looped over a limb, or otherwise placed upon their person, the crown inflicts damage equal to its level.
